fields.name: kind
fields.description: Discriminator. Always 'assertion-template' for this memento family.

fields.name: fn_name
fields.description: Human-readable composite name of the form '<predicate-concept>->junit5:<assertion>'. Matches the filename stem.

fields.name: predicate_concept
fields.description: The concept hub operator this template realizes (e.g. 'concept:option-is-some', 'concept:eq'). Must reference an existing concept hub minted under catalog/abstractions/ or catalog/algorithms/.

fields.name: target
fields.description: The native test framework target. Record with two fields: 'framework' (e.g. 'junit5') and 'assertion' (the native assertion method name, e.g. 'assertNotNull', 'assertEquals').

fields.name: formals
fields.description: Ordered list of formal parameter names referenced inside emit_template / harvest_pattern (e.g. ['x'] or ['a', 'b']).

fields.name: formal_sorts
fields.description: Sort constructor for each formal, parallel to 'formals' (e.g. [{kind: ctor, name: OptionOfA}] or [{kind: ctor, name: Comparable}]).

fields.name: emit_template
fields.description: EMITTER direction. The native-language assertion source string with {formal} placeholders. Substituting actual argument source into the placeholders yields a syntactically valid call in the target framework.

fields.name: harvest_pattern
fields.description: HARVESTER direction (primary). The canonical native source pattern this template matches against (with {formal} placeholders). Multiple distinct comparison ops (lt/gt/le/ge) all map to assertTrue, so this pattern carries the disambiguating inline operator literally.

fields.name: harvest_pattern_alt
fields.description: HARVESTER direction (alternatives). Additional surface-form patterns the harvester should also recognise as the same predicate (e.g. 'assertTrue({x} != null)' as an alt for 'assertNotNull({x})'). May be empty.

fields.name: loss_record
fields.description: Structural-divergence dictionary noting where the JUnit assertion form loses information relative to the abstract concept (per ProvekIt first principle: exact, loudly-bounded-lossy, or refuse). May be empty if the form is exact.

fields.name: discharge_receipt
fields.description: Either a CID of an executed discharge receipt, or 'deferred:pending-pk-<NNNN>' until the per-language predicate-emitter plugin lands and re-verifies.

fields.name: effects
fields.description: Effect annotations on this assertion form. JUnit assertions typically have effect 'assertion-failure-throw' or empty; reserved for richer effect typing once plugins land.
